response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is an experienced full-stack and backend software developer with a strong track record in web systems, low-latency services, and developer tooling, but he has no demonstrated experience in the core technical areas required for this role — specifically SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator optimization, deep neural network workload analysis, GPU architecture, or hardware-software co-design. His AI-adjacent work at re:cinq involves agentic application infrastructure (MCP frameworks), not hardware or ML systems. With only a BS in Computer Science, the 8+ years experience threshold is met, but the experience is entirely in application-layer software, not silicon or systems architecture.
strengths: 17+ years of continuous software engineering experience demonstrates seniority and adaptability across domains
Documented high-performance systems work (millions of HTTP req/s, async I/O, low-latency pipelines at Sociomantic) shows performance engineering sensibility
Active AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq indicates familiarity with modern ML tooling ecosystems
concerns: Zero experience with SoC/IP modeling, hardware architecture, or chip-level design — the core technical requirement of the role
No background in deep neural network training or inference optimization, GPU workloads, or SIMD/MIMD architectures
Skill set is entirely application-layer (TypeScript, Node.js, MongoDB, React) with no systems programming or hardware co-design credentials

key_factors.factor: No SoC/IP or hardware architecture experience
No AI/ML workload or accelerator expertise
